name: Muhammad Bima Adi Prabowo
summary: I am a Software Engineer from Bandung, Indonesia with 6 years of working experience, currently working at Quantus Telematika Indonesia. I am excited to explore new technology because it feels like an adventure for me. I think a good software engineer must often explore new technology. New tech always comes every year. If we do not keep up with technology, we will be left behind.

experience.title: Software Engineer - Full Time at Quantus Telematika Indonesia
experience.description: Develop and maintain certain projects (AnalitiQ, Asset Management System, Coal Trip, Koperasi). I also do research on new tech stacks and tools to improve team productivity.

experience.title: Backend Developer - Freelance at DOT Indonesia
Backend Developer - Intern at Lembaga Ilmu Pengetahuan Indonesia
experience.description: Created a web app for Twitter sentiment analysis, including deploying the machine learning model and streaming Twitter (X) data.
